## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was this change needed?

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] Relevant tests were run
- [ ] Manual verification was completed

## Release Notes

- Release note type: `feat` | `fix` | `docs` | `chore` | `refactor` | `perf` | `test`
- User-facing summary:

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows the same semantic style as the final squash commit
- [ ] User-facing behavior changes are described above
- [ ] Non-user-facing maintenance work is marked clearly
